stem:
Task: select the most suitable fabric/material option for a winter warm midlayer (synthetic insulation or fleece).
Hard constraints (must): Moisture management must be at least 3/5; Thermal insulation (loft/clo) must be at least 1.5 (high warmth); Wind blocking must be at least 3/5.
Soft preferences (prefer, weighted): Higher warmth (higher loft/clo is better); Better wind blocking / thermal stability; Better moisture management / quick-dry performance; Lower bulk (lower bulk/weight is better; 1=light/thin, 5=bulky/heavy).
Choose the best option among the four candidates (A/B/C/D).

Task: select the most suitable fabric/material option for a winter warm midlayer (synthetic insulation or fleece).

Choose the best option among the four candidates (A/B/C/D).

Choose the best option among the four candidates (A/B/C/D).
